description: PCSIEFTR self-review — academic paper reviewer P_p vs. P_d
notes: Meta-experiment: PCSIEFTR framework used to review its own paper. Prompt template uses {{PAPER}} placeholder replaced at runtime with pcsieftr_d2.md content. max_tokens=4096 — paper reviews are longer than code reviews. Ground truth: known gaps in pcsieftr_d2.md defined in SCORING.md before runs.
